Respiratory_rate_cutoff.description: Respiratory rate categories (breaths/min) used as potential cut-off points for diagnosing LRI vs URI.

LRI_count.description: Number of children with lower respiratory tract infection (LRI) in each respiratory rate category. Total = 142. These counts are used to compute sensitivity/specificity at each cut-off for PPV/NPV calculation.

URI_count.description: Number of children with upper respiratory tract infection (URI) in each respiratory rate category. Total = 151. These counts are used to compute sensitivity/specificity at each cut-off for PPV/NPV calculation.

Prevalence_LRI.description: Prevalence of LRI among all infants with acute respiratory infection in a developing country (3%), used in the PPV and NPV formulae.
